name: DevOps & Automation
student_summary: Automate how software is built, tested and shipped so teams release faster and safer.
overview: Automate how software is built, tested and shipped so teams release faster and safer. DevOps & Automation sits in the Security & Infrastructure family of Technology & Computing. It is a broad career direction — you can enter it through several routes and specialize later without restarting.
who_is_this_for: You are drawn to security & infrastructure and want a broad path you can shape
who_should_avoid: You strongly prefer solitary desk work over this field's day-to-day reality
daily_responsibilities: Apply ci/cd pipelines to real problems
Collaborate with your team using scripting
Keep improving at containerization — the field keeps moving
Communicate progress, results and decisions to the people who depend on them
work_environment: Office or fully remote — laptop work with flexible location
problem_solving_style: Adaptive — mix analysis, action and people skills as the situation demands
scope: Demand outlook in India is booming; see FAQs for how the platform keeps this current.
ai_impact: low — AI assists rather than replaces
advantages: Demand is booming: opportunities across India and beyond
Strong earning ceiling (₹50 LPA+ at senior levels)
A broad Security & Infrastructure foundation that opens multiple specializations later
challenges: Early years demand patience before the rewards compound
misconceptions: “You must pick your exact job title now.” DevOps & Automation is a direction — specialization comes later.
“Only toppers make it.” Consistent skill-building beats one exam rank in the long run.
portfolio_ideas: A documented case study of scripting
projects: Beginner: explore ci/cd pipelines with a small self-chosen project
Intermediate: build or run something real using Docker
smaller_city_scope: Remote-friendly: smaller-city living with metro-level work is realistic.
rural_scope: Limited rural presence; expect to base yourself in a town or city.
home_state_note: Ask the AI coach about your state — regional demand, cities and relocation advice are generated live from retrieved data, never hardcoded.
transition_paths: Toward Cloud & Infrastructure: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
Toward Software Engineering: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
Toward Quality Assurance & Testing: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
faqs: What does DevOps & Automation pay in India?
Entry roles typically start around ₹5 LPA and senior professionals reach ₹50 LPA or more. Live, region-specific salary data is retrieved by the platform when you ask.
What should I study after Class 12?
Focus on Computer Science, Mathematics. Typical degrees: B.Tech CSE/IT, BCA. Alternatives exist: bootcamps + a strong project portfolio.
Will AI take over this career?
AI impact is low — AI assists rather than replaces. Broad paths like DevOps & Automation evolve rather than disappear — the students who pair domain skill with AI tools benefit most.
Is this a broad path or a specific job?
DevOps & Automation is a career direction. Once inside it you can specialize further — the platform will map specializations in future versions.
